wine_retailers.name: Produttori del Barbaresco Wine Shop
wine_retailers.description: The shop of the historic Barbaresco growers' cooperative, beneath the village tower. Sells the cooperative's Barbaresco and single-vineyard Riserva alongside Langhe Nebbiolo, with a short tasting at the counter.
wine_retailers.speciality: Barbaresco DOCG and single-vineyard Riserva from the Produttori cooperative

wine_retailers.name: Enoteca Fracchia and Berchialla
wine_retailers.description: Historic wine shop in central Alba with a deep collection of Barolo, Barbaresco and Nebbiolo d'Alba plus Langhe sparkling and back-vintages. A go-to for hard-to-find Langhe grower bottlings.
wine_retailers.speciality: Barolo and Barbaresco back-vintages, small-grower Langhe wines

wine_retailers.name: Carosso Enoteca Drogheria
wine_retailers.address: Via Vittorio Emanuele II 23, 12051 Alba CN, Italy
wine_retailers.description: Nearly century-old enoteca and grocery in central Alba with a wide Langhe assortment weighted to DOC and DOCG wines, alongside spirits, liqueurs and Piedmont specialities. Family-run with hands-on advice.
wine_retailers.speciality: Langhe DOC and DOCG wines, Piedmont spirits and confectionery

wine_retailers.name: Enoteca Grandi Vini
wine_retailers.address: Via Vittorio Emanuele II 17, 12051 Alba CN, Italy
wine_retailers.description: Alba wine shop with online sales focused on Langhe and Roero producers, strong in Barolo and Barbaresco with typical local products alongside. Ships across Italy and abroad.
wine_retailers.speciality: Barolo, Barbaresco and Roero with online shipping

wine_retailers.name: Casa del Barolo
wine_retailers.address: Via Andrea Doria 7, 10123 Torino TO, Italy
wine_retailers.description: Central Turin enoteca specialised in Piedmontese wine for more than thirty years, with over 1,000 wines and spirits across two floors. A deep Barolo and Barbaresco selection in the city.
wine_retailers.speciality: Barolo, Barbaresco and Piedmont wines plus spirits
